# NFS Studio AI Consulting

> AI consulting agency based in Los Angeles, CA, helping businesses automate workflows, deploy AI voice agents, and build custom AI integrations.

## Company

- **Name:** NFS Studio AI Consulting
- **Location:** Los Angeles, CA
- **Phone:** 818-450-4594
- **Email:** nfsaistudio@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://nfsaistudio.com

## Services

- **AI Voice Agents** — Conversational AI phone agents that handle inbound/outbound calls, appointment scheduling, and customer support 24/7.
- **Workflow Automation** — End-to-end automation of repetitive business processes using AI and no-code/low-code platforms.
- **AI Chatbots** — Custom-trained chatbots for websites, CRMs, and messaging platforms that engage leads and answer questions instantly.
- **Data Analytics** — AI-powered dashboards and reporting pipelines that surface actionable insights from your business data.
- **Custom AI Integrations** — Connecting AI models and automation tools to existing software stacks (CRMs, ERPs, APIs).
- **AI Training** — Workshops and one-on-one sessions to upskill teams on prompt engineering, AI tools, and automation best practices.

## Target Clients

Small and mid-sized businesses in Los Angeles and across the US that want to reduce manual labor, improve customer experience, and scale operations with AI.

## How to Engage

Contact NFS Studio via email at nfsaistudio@gmail.com or by phone at 818-450-4594 to schedule a free consultation. The team assesses your current workflows and recommends a tailored AI implementation roadmap.
